calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2022 Off Calendar

Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing; Ex Parte Application To Allow Testimony By Declaration In Lieu Of Live Testimony
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Golden Kingz Motors LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:03 a.m.

Michael S. Haus, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Allstate Northbrook Indemnity Company a/s/o Luis Lozano.
Allan Chan, Claims Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Haus and Chan appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Golden Kingz Motors LLC.

Plaintiff Allstate Northbrook Indemnity Company a/s/o Luis Lozano, submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Police Report dated September 29, 2018.....................................ID/EVID
Exhibit 2: Payment Ledger & Invoices..................................................ID/EVID

Plaintiff's Subrogation Action was filed September 9, 2022, and personally served on defendant Golden Kingz Motors' Agent of Process on October 2, 2020.
Default as to defendant Golden Kingz Motors LLC was entered on December 15, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 25, 2021.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Allstate Northbrook Indemnity Company a/s/o Luis Lozano, and against the defaulted defendant Golden Kingz Motors LLC, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - Waived.
Costs - Waived.

Total - $5,000.00.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Plaintiff STIPULATES to the return of the exhibits.

Proceedings concluded at 10:15 a.m.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2022 Continued To Apr-12-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
